ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked mount anglesby at position 7 with only 4.0% probability. Top pick was Got A Dream (23.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Got A Dream > Kel Du Large, but actual result was Mount Anglesby > Kel Du Large. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Mount Anglesby had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -1.9%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
